query:
INSERT INTO lectures (title, description, sessionDate, duration, zoomLink, uploadedBy, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES (
  'Choosing the Right Study Design to Achieve the Best Outcome',
  'Join Dr. Abdullah Al Alawi for an essential session on selecting the optimal research study design for your clinical questions. Learn how different study designs impact the validity, feasibility, and impact of your research outcomes.

📚 Learning Objectives:
• Understand the hierarchy of evidence and how study design affects research quality
• Learn to match your research question (PICO) to the appropriate study design
• Compare strengths and limitations of observational vs interventional studies
• Master the selection criteria for case-control, cohort, and cross-sectional designs
• Identify common pitfalls in study design selection and how to avoid them
• Develop a systematic approach to designing feasible and impactful clinical research

👨‍⚕️ Speaker: Dr. Abdullah M. Al Alawi
Co-Founder, MedResearch Academy | Senior Medical Researcher

⏱️ Duration: 60 minutes (20:00-21:00 Muscat Time)',
  '2026-01-28 16:00:00',
  '60 minutes',
  'https://us02web.zoom.us/j/86479840360?pwd=cl9IYzFAcAb1oIxbZoVbW8GzhxiPOS.1',
  1,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
